mortgage_protection.name: Mortgage Protection
mortgage_protection.description: Ensures your family can stay in their home by paying off the remaining mortgage balance if something happens to you.
selling_points: Converts whole life exposure to specific protection
mortgage_protection.education_script: Mortgage protection insurance ensures your family can stay in their home by paying off the remaining mortgage balance if something happens to you.
mortgage_protection.qualification_cta: Based on your answers, you may qualify for plans between $150k-$500k.
mortgage_protection.ca_scenario: A 35-year-old in San Jose with a new mortgage buys a 20-year term policy to match their loan payoff timeline.

family_life.name: Family Life Insurance
family_life.description: Term or permanent life insurance to replace your income and protect your family's long-term financial security.
family_life.education_script: Family life insurance replaces your income so your family can maintain their lifestyle, pay bills, and fund future goals like college.

final_expense.name: Final Expense
final_expense.description: Covers funeral costs, medical bills, and end-of-life expenses so your family is not financially burdened.
selling_points: Covers funeral and burial costs ($9,000-$15,000 average in CA)
final_expense.education_script: Final expense insurance covers funeral costs, medical bills, and end-of-life expenses. Average funeral cost in California is $9,000-$15,000.

business_protection.name: Business Protection
business_protection.description: Key person insurance, buy-sell agreement funding, and business continuity coverage to protect your company.
selling_points: Protects against loss of key employees
Business continuity on death of owner
business_protection.ca_scenario: A 60-year-old Los Angeles business owner uses permanent life to fund a buy-sell agreement with a partner, ensuring business continuity.

ca_demographic_targeting.note: Use for geo-targeted lead scoring — homeowner counties convert highest
